privileged_info_summary: The task involves creating a MySQL database through the Virtualmin control panel (version 8.x) accessible at https://localhost:10000 using credentials root / GymAnything123!. The target is to create a database with 'shop' suffix for the virtual server 'brightstar.test'. Virtualmin uses the naming convention ${PREFIX}_ (underscore suffix), so the database would be named either 'brightstar_shop' (if no automatic account prefixing) or 'brightstar_brightstar_shop' (if auto-prefixed). The task navigates to the MySQL Databases management page via the list_databases.cgi endpoint with the domain ID as parameter. The underlying database system is MariaDB. All environment configuration, domain creation, and Virtualmin setup have been completed by pre-start and post-start scripts.
